summary: Made two surgical seam edits: aligned Cliff's debt-pressure line with the continuity sheet's note timeline, and trimmed the chapter-ending handoff so Chapter 2 can carry Paul's first reaction without duplicate movement.
edits: Adjusted Cliff's Friday-night debt complaint to match the canonical default and October note schedule.
Reworked Nate's final beat at Paul's door to end on his seized voice instead of replaying Paul's movement into Chapter 2.
